title: Building with ADK & A2A: How multi-agent collaboration designs a game
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates multi-agent collaboration using the Agent Development Kit and Agent2Agent protocol to build a game with distinct AI agents working on architecture, asset rendering, and project management. The demo showcases a human-in-the-loop framework for agentic development on Cloud Run.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol let multiple AI agents collaborate on game design, dividing work across architecture, asset rendering, and project management. The demo runs as a human-in-the-loop multi-agent system on Cloud Run, keeping a person in the development cycle. Key takeaways: ADK provides the framework for building the agents, A2A defines how they coordinate, and the combination supports agentic development of a concrete deliverable rather than a single-agent workflow.
